englishDefinitions: A shot in film or photography of a person's head and shoulders taken from a distance, often using a long lens or camera setup that keeps the subject far from the camera.
In production, a head-and-shoulders shot captured without the camera being physically close to the subject.
persianTranslation: شات/تصویر سر و شانه از فاصلهٔ دور
examples: The director asked for a remote headshot to keep the background uncluttered.
We used a remote headshot so the actor would not feel crowded by the camera.
The documentary includes several remote headshots of the interview subjects.
